mapper.select: SELECT ac.id AS application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ac.posting_date, ac.status, ac.is_favorite, ac.created_at, ac.updated_at, fa.fit_score, fa.missing_skills, fa.created_at AS analyzed_at, ja.required_skills, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session interview_count_source WHERE interview_count_source.application_case_id = ac.id ) AS interview_count, ( SELECT latest_interview.total_score FROM interview_session latest_interview WHERE latest_interview.application_case_id = ac.id AND latest_interview.total_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY latest_interview.created_at DESC, latest_interview.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_interview_score FROM application_case ac LEFT JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.application_case_id = ac.id AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = ac.id ) LEFT JOIN job_analysis ja ON ja.application_case_id = ac.id AND ja.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_ja.id) FROM job_analysis latest_ja WHERE latest_ja.application_case_id = ac.id ) WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ac.is_favorite DESC, COALESCE(fa.created_at, ac.updated_at) DESC, ac.id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session interview INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = interview.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND interview.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURRENT_DATE) DAY)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(credit_used), 0) FROM ai_usage_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y-%m-01')
